requirement_topic.en: EAEU Battery and Hazardous-Substance Conformity — TR EAEU 037/2016 and TR CU Basis
requirement_topic.zh: EAEU电池与有害物质合规——TR EAEU 037/2016与TR CU体系
requirement_topic.zht: EAEU電池與有害物質合規——TR EAEU 037/2016與TR CU體系

summary.en: Kazakhstan applies EAEU technical regulation routes for in-scope electrical and battery products with mandatory EAC marking. The key legal anchors are TR CU 004/2011 on low-voltage safety, TR CU 020/2011 on electromagnetic compatibility, and TR EAEU 037/2016 on restricted substances in electrical and electronic equipment and batteries. Importantly, Kazakhstan is within the EAEU, so energy-efficiency and import procedures are handled in the EAC technical framework and by in-country importer arrangements, not through separate China-export-only pathways.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦对范围内电气及电池产品采用EAEU合规路线并要求EAC标志。核心法律依据包括TR CU 004/2011低压安全、TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容和TR EAEU 037/2016电气电子设备与锂电池中的受限有害物质规定。哈萨克斯坦是EAEU成员，能效及进口流程由EAC框架和本地进口商机制处理，不是中国出口导向的独立路径。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦對範圍內電氣及電池產品採用EAEU合規路線並要求EAC標誌。核心法律依據包括TR CU 004/2011低壓安全、TR CU 020/2011電磁相容及TR EAEU 037/2016電器電氣電子設備與鋰電池之受限有害物質規定。哈薩克斯坦為EAEU成員，能效及進口流程由EAC框架和本地進口商機制處理，不是僅適用中國出口的單獨路徑。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 On the safety of low-voltage equipment
TR CU 020/2011 Electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices
TR EAEU 037/2016 Restriction of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment
EAEU conformity assessment and EAC marking rules

summary.en: China export documentation typically starts from GB 31241-2022 safety and CCC where applicable. These instruments are domestic market tools and do not substitute Kazakhstan EAC conformity steps. CN documentation may support technical comparison, but Kazakhstan requires the EAEU route, EAC evidence, and importer-handled market access steps before placement.
summary.zh: 中国出口资料通常以GB 31241-2022安全要求和适用类别的CCC为起点。上述制度为中国国内市场工具，不能替代哈萨克斯坦EAC合规路径。中国资料可用于技术对照，但哈萨克斯坦仍要求按EAEU路线完成EAC证据及由进口商处理的市场准入程序。
summary.zht: 中國出口資料通常以GB 31241-2022安全要求及適用類別的CCC為起點。上述制度為中國國內市場工具，不能替代哈薩克斯坦EAC合規路徑。中國資料可用於技術對照，但哈薩克斯坦仍要求按EAEU路線完成EAC證據及由進口商處理的市場准入流程。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
CCC — China Compulsory Certification for selected domestic product categories

gap.en: The structural gap is procedural and documentary. A Chinese GB 31241 report or CCC file does not by itself create Kazakhstan market access. Kazakhstan expects EAEU TR CU based evidence, EAC marking workflow through qualified channels, and in-country importer responsibility for customs and local filings.
gap.zh: 差异在于程序和文件。单独的GB 31241检测报告或CCC文件不能直接创造哈萨克斯坦市场准入。哈萨克斯坦通常要求基于EAEU TR CU的证据链、经合格渠道办理EAC标志，并由本地进口商承担海关及本地申报责任。
gap.zht: 差異在於程序和文件。單獨的GB 31241檢測報告或CCC文件不能直接創造哈薩克斯坦市場准入。哈薩克斯坦通常要求基於EAEU TR CU的證據鏈、經合格渠道辦理EAC標誌，並由本地進口商承擔海關及本地申報責任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope products due to Kazakhstan being an EAEU member using EAC conformity and applicable TR CU and TR EAEU routes
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic China placement under GB 31241 where applicable, but does not provide Kazakhstan market access equivalence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB 31241 or CCC documentation is useful technical input but does not complete Kazakhstan EAEU route obligations. Exporters should map CN evidence into the TR CU 004/2011, TR CU 020/2011, and TR EAEU 037/2016 framework before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 31241或CCC文件可作为技术输入，但不能完成哈萨克斯坦的EAEU路径要求。出口商应在出货前将中国资料映射至TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016框架。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 31241或CCC文件可作為技術輸入，但不能完成哈薩克斯坦的EAEU路徑要求。出口商應在出貨前將中國資料映射至TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016框架。
